content: In 2025 SOTA frameworks where memory itself functions as an active learning agent, the entire agent architecture can be reframed as a nested hierarchy of semi-autonomous memory agents, rather than a single controller with a passive memory module. Each sub-component of memory (working, episodic, semantic) acts as an independent curiosity-driven agent that selectively proposes which new experiences to encode or retrieve, rather than waiting for commands from a central controller.
source_topics: memory as active learning agent SOTA 2025
